title: 10 best herbal creams for edema
description: Echinacea purpurea, also known as purple coneflower, creams helps with edema because of its potent anti-inflammatory properties. The extract from the plant's roots and flowers contains compounds that reduce inflammation and swelling, making it an effective natural remedy for edema. Echinacea purpurea creams work by improving lymphatic circulation, which helps to remove excess fluids and reduce puffiness.
